title: lastrea stierii
side_effects: Lastrea stierii can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, respiratory issues, and skin irritation in sensitive individuals. Prolonged consumption of the plant's extract may also lead to stomach problems, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. In severe cases, improper use of Lastrea stierii can cause anaphylaxis, a life-threatening allergic reaction that requires immediate medical attention. It's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using the plant for medicinal purposes to avoid these potential side effects.
